inputs.label: Beats per Measure
inputs.businessContext: Top number of time signature (number of beats per measure)

businessContext_i18n.en: Top number of time signature (number of beats per measure)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman işaretinin üst sayısı (ölçü başına vuruş sayısı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Obere Zahl der Taktart (Anzahl der Schläge pro Takt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chiffre supérieur de la signature rythmique (nombre de temps par mesure)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número superior del compás (número de pulsos por compás)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرقم العلوي لتوقيع الزمن (عدد النبضات في المازورة)

inputs.label: Note Value
inputs.businessContext: Bottom number of time signature (which note value gets one beat, e.g., 4=quarter, 8=eighth)

businessContext_i18n.en: Bottom number of time signature (which note value gets one beat, e.g., 4=quarter, 8=eighth)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman işaretinin alt sayısı (hangi nota değerinin bir vuruş aldığı, örn. 4=dörtlük, 8=sekizlik)
businessContext_i18n.de: Untere Zahl der Taktart (welcher Notenwert einen Schlag erhält, z.B. 4=Viertel, 8=Achtel)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chiffre inférieur de la signature rythmique (quelle note vaut un temps, ex. 4=noire, 8=croche)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número inferior del compás (qué nota recibe un pulso, ej. 4=negra, 8=corchea)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرقم السفلي لتوقيع الزمن (أي قيمة نوتة تحصل على نبضة واحدة، مثلاً 4=ربع، 8=ثمن)

inputs.label: Tempo
inputs.businessContext: Beats per minute (typically the beat unit equals the denominator note value)

businessContext_i18n.en: Beats per minute (typically the beat unit equals the denominator note value)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki vuruş sayısı (genellikle vuruş birimi payda nota değerine eşittir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Schläge pro Minute (typischerweise entspricht die Schlageinheit dem Nenner-Notenwert)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps par minute (généralement l'unité de temps correspond à la note du dénominateur)
businessContext_i18n.es: Pulsos por minuto (normalmente la unidad de pulso es igual al valor de nota del denominador)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نبضة في الدقيقة (عادةً ما تساوي وحدة النبضة قيمة النوتة في المقام)

inputs.label: Number of Measures
inputs.businessContext: Number of measures to calculate total duration

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of measures to calculate total duration
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam süreyi hesaplamak için ölçü sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Takte zur Berechnung der Gesamtdauer
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mesures pour calculer la durée totale
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de compases para calcular la duración total

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
